hero.name: Akash Yaduwanshi
hero.description: Travel through the architecture of an AI engineer's mind. An interactive cinematic neural experience.

paragraphs: I am an aspiring AI Engineer and Machine Learning researcher passionate about designing practical AI applications. My work spans research-oriented projects, intelligent developer tools, customer analytics, and multi-agent systems.
Focused on representation learning, LLM integration, and scalable system design, I enjoy turning ideas into deployable systems with clean architecture and measurable impact.

featuredProjects.title: Sentinel Flow
featuredProjects.desc: AI Code Intelligence System mapping codebases into interactive knowledge graphs with dual-path AI routing.

featuredProjects.title: PhantmOS v3.0
featuredProjects.desc: Autonomous Multi-Agent Job Engine. Discovers remote jobs, scores relevance, and tailors applications using LLMs.

featuredProjects.title: Reasoning Bottlenecks
featuredProjects.desc: Implemented slot-based reasoning bottlenecks in small Transformers, improving mean accuracy on the SCAN benchmark from 0.55 to 0.71.

featuredProjects.title: DSRA
featuredProjects.desc: Deep Scientific Research Agent. Autonomous parsing and synthesis of dense scientific literature into actionable intelligence.

allProjects.title: Sentinel Flow
allProjects.subtitle: AI-Powered Codebase Intelligence
allProjects.desc: A VS Code extension that transforms complex codebases into an interactive, AI-powered knowledge graph. It provides deep architectural insights, real-time dependency tracking, and intelligent code analysis directly within the editor.

allProjects.title: ORA (Outfit Rental Assistant)
allProjects.subtitle: Digital OS for Fashion Rentals
allProjects.desc: A Vertical SaaS platform and B2C marketplace that digitizes operations for unorganized fashion rental boutiques, bridging the gap between online discovery and in-store verification via a QR-based offline attribution system.

allProjects.title: PhantmOS
allProjects.subtitle: Autonomous Multi-Agent Job Application Engine
allProjects.desc: A completely autonomous command center designed to discover remote opportunities, score them against user résumés using semantic AI, and execute applications via an LLM waterfall. Fires off cold emails on autopilot.

allProjects.title: Connect Hub
allProjects.subtitle: Real-time Campus Collaboration Platform
allProjects.desc: A modern, gamified campus platform built for students to share notes, ask questions, and collaborate with instant, typo-tolerant search capabilities. Features real-time Q&A forums and leaderboards.

allProjects.title: Reasoning Bottlenecks
allProjects.subtitle: AI Research on Compositional Reasoning
allProjects.desc: A systematic experimental research study evaluating whether architectural constraints (bottlenecks) can induce compositional generalization in small (5–10M parameter) Transformer models using the SCAN benchmark.

allProjects.title: SmartCart Segmentation
allProjects.subtitle: Unsupervised Machine Learning Pipeline
allProjects.desc: An end-to-end unsupervised learning pipeline that processes customer demographic and behavioral data to uncover distinct purchasing segments. Uses PCA, K-Means, and Agglomerative Clustering.

allProjects.title: DSRA
allProjects.subtitle: Deep Scientific Research Agent
allProjects.desc: An advanced autonomous agent built to navigate, parse, and synthesize dense scientific literature into actionable intelligence.

allProjects.title: Brevity Bot
allProjects.subtitle: AI-Powered Summarization Engine
allProjects.desc: A specialized NLP model designed to parse long-form text and generate concise, accurate summaries while preserving core context.

capabilities.title: Large Language Models
capabilities.desc: Fine-tuning and deploying foundational models using LoRA and QLoRA. Prompt engineering and optimization for production environments.

capabilities.title: RAG Pipelines
capabilities.desc: Architecting robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems with vector databases for context-aware, enterprise-grade AI applications.

capabilities.title: Autonomous Agents
capabilities.desc: Designing multi-agent systems and tool-calling architectures for complex reasoning, automated research, and dynamic task execution.

capabilities.title: Scalable Systems
capabilities.desc: Building high-performance APIs and orchestrating containerized microservices to ensure reliable, low-latency AI deployment.
